Scripts.OnLoad: self:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_LOGIN") self:RegisterEvent("UPDATE_BINDINGS") self:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_REGEN_ENABLED") function self.Bind(frame, act, key, ...) if key then SetOverrideBindingClick(self, false, key, frame:GetName(), act) return self.Bind(frame, act, ...) end end function self:steer(down) (down and MouselookStart or MouselookStop)() end function self:archeck() if not InCombatLockdown() and GetUnitSpeed("player") == 0 then SecureHandlerExecute(self, "ar = nil") end end local onClick = [[-- Forward:OnClick if button == "back-toggle" then button, down, fw = "back", not bw, false end if button == "move-toggle" then button, down, bw = "move", not fw, false end if button == "move" then ar, fw = not down and ar, down elseif button == "back" then ar, bw = not down and ar, down elseif button == "steer" then ar, mst = not down and ar, down owner:CallMethod("steer", down) elseif button == "auto" and down then owner:CallMethod("archeck") ar = not ar elseif button == "rel" then print(button, down) ar = down if not down then self:ClearBindings() end owner:CallMethod("steer", down) end if bw and not (ar or fw or mst) then ret, state = state == "bw" and "bw2" or "bw", "bw" elseif (ar or fw or mst) and not bw then ret, state = state == "fw" and "fw2" or "fw", "fw" else ret, state = state, false end return ret ]]; SecureHandlerExecute(self, "ar, fw, bw, mst, state = false, false, false, false, false") for i=0,#self._keys do SecureHandlerWrapScript(self._keys[i] or self, "OnClick", self, onClick) end _G["BINDING_NAME_CLICK ForwardA:auto"], _G["BINDING_NAME_CLICK ForwardB:back"], _G["BINDING_NAME_CLICK ForwardF:move"], _G["BINDING_NAME_CLICK ForwardS:steer"] = BINDING_NAME_TOGGLEAUTORUN, BINDING_NAME_MOVEBACKWARD, BINDING_NAME_MOVEFORWARD, BINDING_NAME_MOVEANDSTEER
Scripts.OnEvent: if event == "PLAYER_REGEN_ENABLED" and not self.pending then elseif InCombatLockdown() then self.pending = true else self.pending = nil ClearOverrideBindings(self) self.Bind(self._keys[1], "auto", GetBindingKey("TOGGLEAUTORUN")) self.Bind(self._keys[2], "back", GetBindingKey("MOVEBACKWARD")) self.Bind(self._keys[3], "move", GetBindingKey("MOVEFORWARD")) self.Bind(self._keys[4], "steer", GetBindingKey("MOVEANDSTEER")) end

Scripts.OnLoad: self:RegisterForClicks("AnyUp") SquareButton_SetIcon(self, "UP") local function update() self:SetChecked(MovePadForward:GetChecked()) end hooksecurefunc(MovePadForward, "SetChecked", update) MovePadForward:HookScript("OnClick", update) MovePadForward:Hide()

self:RegisterForClicks("AnyUp") SquareButton_SetIcon(self, "DOWN") local function update() self:SetChecked(MovePadBackward:GetChecked()) end hooksecurefunc(MovePadBackward, "SetChecked", update) MovePadBackward:HookScript("OnClick", update) MovePadBackward:Hide()
